meta.title: Pharmaceutical Applications - Unicorn Petroleum | Pharma Ingredients
meta.description: High-purity pharmaceutical ingredients compliant with USP/NF, EP, and IP standards.
meta.keywords: pharmaceutical, pharma ingredients, excipients, USP, GMP

overview.title: Tailored for pharmaceutical products
overview.description: Our products are widely used as practical additives and manufacturing aids in the pharmaceutical business. They help in the production of lotions, gels, creams, liquids, and pills for oral use by increasing durability, heterogeneity, and consistency. These components are also employed in topical, oral, and external formulations, as well as medicinal and wellness applications. Additionally, they help with lubrication, surface protection, and equipment efficiency during packaging activities within this industry. Their purified character makes them ideal for applications that need purity and dependability. Manufacturers utilize them to guarantee that their finished products are processed efficiently, operate consistently, and give secure and excellent healthcare solutions.

hero.title: Cosmetics Applications
hero.description: Beauty ingredients that meet global standards

meta.title: Cosmetic Applications - Unicorn Petroleum | Beauty Ingredients
meta.description: Premium cosmetic ingredients for skincare, makeup, and hair care formulations.
meta.keywords: cosmetics, beauty ingredients, skincare, makeup chemicals

overview.title: Cosmetic industry
overview.description: Our chemicals are frequently used as both base materials and functional additions in cosmetic formulations. They improve the texture, gloss, and spreading ability of cosmetic and skincare products. These chemicals improve formulation stability and homogeneity in a wide range of product types, particularly lotions and creams, lip balms, and pigmented cosmetics. They provide a smooth application of face, body, and lip care products while also boosting the sensory experience. Their adaptability also allows for usage in decorative cosmetics and skin conditioning treatments and this versatility qualifies them for an extensive list of cosmetic advancements and developments.

hero.title: Personal Care Applications
hero.description: Ingredients for daily care and hygiene

meta.title: Personal Care Applications - Unicorn Petroleum | Hygiene Ingredients
meta.description: Quality ingredients for personal hygiene, baby care, and dermatological products.
meta.keywords: personal care, hygiene, baby care, dermatological ingredients

overview.title: Personal Care
overview.description: Our products have a substantial influence on generic personal care formulas. They help to retain moisture, increase suppleness, and facilitate delicate treatment to one's skin and hair. These materials contribute to product durability and increased shelf life in both day-to-day usage and wash-off formulations. These are extensively used in dermatological applications, hair treatment, pediatric treatment, dental care, and other personal hygiene products. They also find their use in helping with cleaning, conditioning, and protection in daily activities. Their steady functioning assures continuous quality in consumer goods allowing manufacturers to furnish dependable and efficient personal care solutions.

hero.title: Home Care Applications
hero.description: Reliable ingredients for home care industry

meta.title: Home Care Applications - Unicorn Petroleum | Cleaning Ingredients
meta.description: Functional additives for household cleaning, polishing, and surface care products.
meta.keywords: home care, cleaning chemicals, surface care, household detergents

overview.title: Home Care
overview.description: Our products are commonly used as useful additives in home care and cleaning solutions. They improve the product's efficacy, stability, and convenience of use. These materials provide effective cleaning, surface protection and monitored usage of spray-based formulations. Our products’ finds applications in home cleansers, detergents, polishing agents, and surface care products such as those for the kitchen, bathroom, and floor. In everyday use, their stability and dependability contribute to consistent outcomes. They allow manufacturers to provide safe, effective, and trustworthy home care solutions for everyday use.

hero.title: Textile Applications
hero.description: Performance chemicals for fiber and fabric processing

meta.title: Textile Applications - Unicorn Petroleum | Textile Chemicals
meta.description: Specialized processing aids for spinning, weaving, and textile finishing.
meta.keywords: textile chemicals, fiber lubrication, weaving aids, fabric finishing

overview.title: Textile Industry
overview.description: Our products are commonly used as processing aids in the textile manufacturing and finishing sectors. They help with fibre lubrication, yarn creation, and fabric handling throughout the manufacturing process, including fibre preparation. These substances improve machine function and minimize friction on high-speed processing lines. They have numerous applications in the fields of spinning, weaving, knitting, finishing, and fabric treatment activities, such as dyeing and coating procedures. Their stability and homogeneity contribute to constant fabric quality and processing efficiency. They help textile producers achieve dependable performance and predictable manufacturing results.

meta.title: Lubricant Applications - Unicorn Petroleum | Base Oils & Waxes
meta.description: High-purity base oils and waxes for automotive and industrial lubricants.
meta.keywords: lubricants, base oils, paraffin wax, hydraulic fluid components

overview.title: Lubricant Industry
overview.description: Our materials are used in lubricant formulations as functional components and base stocks. They help to provide consistent performance, controlled viscosity, and thermal stability. These materials provide for smooth mechanical action, wear prevention, and friction reduction in hydraulic systems, gear oils, and industrial equipment applications. They may be utilized in a wide range of automotive, marine, and heavy-duty industrial lubricant compositions. Their durability guarantees consistent performance across a wide variety of operational circumstances enabling lubricant manufacturers to provide long-lasting, efficient and diverse lubrication solutions.

meta.title: Agrochemical Applications - Unicorn Petroleum | Crop Protection
meta.description: Adjuvants and oils for pesticides, fertilizers, and plant protection products.
meta.keywords: agrochemical, crop care, pesticide adjuvants, fertilizer coating

overview.title: Agrochemical products
overview.description: Agrochemical products need to perform under tough environmental conditions. Our base materials—such as mineral oils and waxes—enhance formulation stability, delivery efficiency, and surface adhesion in pesticides, fertilizers, and plant protection products.
